positive: Neo-geometric design featuring stylized celestial elements and abstracted alpine flora. The composition must be highly detailed, symmetrical, and centralized, suitable for repeating textile prints. Emphasize clean silhouettes, tessellation, and strong contrast. Use a limited, rich color palette of midnight indigo, oxidized copper, and metallic ivory. Style should mimic intricate woodcut engraving mixed with modern vector line art. Lighting should be dramatic and even, allowing the patterns to shine without gradient bleed. Focus on the interplay of solid negative space and fine, contrasting lines.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, messy, grain, text, watermark, signature, low detail, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, faded, gradient, photorealistic, logo, anime, cartoon, jpeg artifacts
